description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, these leather and nubuck slippers from ganuchi are a perfect addition to your wardrobe.UpperSoft, wide leather straps with a toe separator to hold the foot in placeSoft nubuck footbed with a padded leather patch on the heel and brand name embossed on it for all-day comfort and styleMidsoleRubber midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfortOutsoleTextured durable rubber outsole with horizontal grooves for absolute grip on smooth surfacesshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and nubuck brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
